questionHtml:
Step-up transformers are used in the distribution of electrical energy to


A.  reduce the danger of electrical shock to humans.

B.  decrease the potential difference between the ends of long-distance transmission lines.

C.  allow direct current appliances to work in domestic applications.

D.  decrease the electrical current in long-distance transmission lines.

meta.title: Step-up transformers are used in the distribution of electrical energy to A. reduce the danger of electrical shock to humans. B. decrease the potential difference between the ends
